hooks.command: echo "[agents] Session started: read AGENTS.md and relevant skills before acting."

echo "$TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND" | grep -q "git commit" && echo "$TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND" | grep -vE "git commit -m \"(feat|fix|docs|style|refactor|perf|test|build|ci|chore|revert)(\\(.+\\))?: .+\"" && echo "STOP: Conventional Commits required" && exit 1 || exit 0
echo "$TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND" | grep -q "git push" && git branch --show-current | grep -E "^(main|master|production)$" && echo "STOP: Push from protected branch blocked" && exit 1 || exit 0
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | grep -E '(\.lock|lock\.|\.env)' && echo 'STOP: Do not edit lockfiles or .env directly' && exit 1 || exit 0
